title: CacheMetrics
description: Data cache and procedure cache performance statistics for the SAP ASE server.

dataCacheHitRatio.description: Percentage of data cache hits versus total requests.

procedureCacheHitRatio.description: Percentage of procedure cache hits versus total requests.

namedCaches.description: Performance metrics for each named data cache.

hitRatio.description: Cache hit ratio for this named cache.

sizeMB.description: Total size of this named cache in megabytes.

usedMB.description: Space currently used in this cache in megabytes.
